episodes.title: Mother Found Not Guilty by Reason of Insanity in Son’s Drowning | Crime House 24/7
episodes.description: Vanessa Richardson brings you the latest breaking true crime stories. An Ohio judge has found an Amish mother not guilty by reason of insanity in the drowning death of her four-year-old son at Atwood Lake — a case investigators say unfolded during a shared spiritual delusion that also led to the drowning death of her husband. In Utah, a missing persons investigation has turned into a homicide case after a woman’s body was discovered inside her husband’s camper at a storage facility, while the husband fled the state and is now considered a person of interest. In Arkansas, a man charged with murdering the alleged abuser of his teenage daughter has won the Republican primary for county sheriff while awaiting trial. And in New York, singer Justin Timberlake is suing to block the release of police body camera footage from his 2024 drunken driving arrest. If you’re new here, don’t forget to follow Crime House 24/7 to never miss a case! For ad-free listening subscribe to Crime House+ on Apple Podcasts.
